docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF REED, ROMAN JASON PATRICK ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM SENT BY CERTIFIED MAIL TO CHRISTINE HAMMER RETURNED: RETURN TO SENDER, ATTEMPTED, NOT KNOWN, UNABLE TO FORWARD.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-24-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-01-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ROMAN JASON PATRICK REED IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT SHREVE & CO. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KATHERINE PHAM. NO PROOF OF SERVICE IS ON FILE AND THE DEFENDANT WOULD NOT WAIVE SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. PLAINTIFF WAS REMINDED TO FILE A ZOOM REQUEST AHEAD OF THE NEXT HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-01-2024 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEC-04-2024 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ROMAN JASON PATRICK REED IS PRESENT VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT SHREVE & CO. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY KATHERINE PHAM. NO PROOF OF SERVICE IS ON FILE AND THE DEFENDANT WOULD NOT WAIVE SERVICE OF THE CLAIM. PLAINTIFF'S ADA REQUEST FOR ZOOM APPEARANCE WAS GRANTED ON 10/29/24 BY JUDGE MASULLO. DEFENDANT IS REMINDED TO FILE A ZOOM REQUEST AHEAD OF THE NEXT HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DANIEL FLORES; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF REED, ROMAN JASON PATRICK IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SHREVE & CO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.
